examples: It was a bout that not only thrilled fans but also provided a severe test of both fighters' mettle, and it was "The Ghost" who emerged with a seventh round TKO victory.
DE La Hoya, whom Pacquiao sent into retirement with an eighth round TKO in their showdown, is regarded as the PPV king with his bout against Mayweather Jr. chalking a record 2.5 million buys.
He returned their support with a decisive 10-round TKO to retain his WBA Super Welterweight crown.
The TKO victory promises to have a major impact on the futures of the two fighters.
Hughie Fury, Tyson's younger cousin, moved to 2-0 with a first round TKO of Alex Rozman (1-1).
